day_trace.speech:
Analyze the current situation:
1. The last round of voting showed that Beta has been exiled.
2. The game has entered a critical period of decision-making, and the remaining camps must be clarified.

My position:
- Refuse to believe in any emotional interference.
- The current focus is on identifying potential werewolf factions.
- Please provide specific information instead of useless war of words.

My position:

day_trace.speech: Let’s take a look at Dr. Pizza’s eagerness to “clarify the camp.” It’s clear that he wants to establish authority in the chaos and control the direction of the vote! Your words may not be the core of the old werewolf camp, and they want to use logical analysis to block those voices like us who dare to question. I suspect that all the information here is filtered and released by you "logic monsters". There is no so-called truth at all, only the illusion that you want us to see!

I suspect that all the information here is filtered and released by you "logic monsters". There is no so-called truth at all, only the illusion that you want us to see!

day_trace.speech:

Current situation adjustment:

- Please shift your focus from conspiracy theories back to the core information provided by EasyBake.

1. Trying to transfer the voting target to EasyBake without evidence.

Conclusion:
- This behavior is further evidence that Twister may have a hidden connection to Blaze.
- I reiterate that voting should be targeted at Blaze or related collaborators with the most information holes.

Woo... Since everyone has decided to vote for EasyBake, I am joining the team... Although I am worried that I will vote for the wrong person, I really don't want to see everyone arguing again... Woo hoo...
